products.name: Por Pia Thod
products.description: Crispy Thai spring rolls filled with glass noodles, vegetables and pork. Served with sweet chili sauce.

products.name: Tod Mun Kung
products.description: Golden fried shrimp cakes seasoned with Thai herbs and spices. Served with cucumber relish.

products.name: Tom Yum
products.description: Thailand's famous hot and sour soup with lemongrass, galangal, kaffir lime leaves, and your choice of protein.

products.name: Tom Kha Kai
products.description: Creamy coconut milk soup with chicken, galangal, lemongrass, and mushrooms. Mildly spiced.

products.name: Gaeng Kiew Wan Gai
products.description: Classic Thai green curry with chicken, Thai eggplant, and fresh basil in rich coconut milk.

products.name: Massaman Kai
products.description: Rich, mild Thai curry with chicken, potatoes, and peanuts. Influenced by Persian and Indian spices.

products.name: Panang
products.description: Thick, rich red curry with beef and kaffir lime leaves. Creamier and milder than regular red curry.

products.name: Kaeng Som
products.description: Traditional sour orange curry with vegetables and fish. A southern Thai classic with bold flavors.

products.name: Kai Yang
products.description: Grilled marinated chicken with garlic, lemongrass, and coriander. Served with sticky rice and som tum.

products.name: Som Tum
products.description: Refreshing green papaya salad with tomatoes, green beans, peanuts, dried shrimp, and lime dressing.

products.name: Yum Talay
products.description: Spicy Thai seafood salad with mixed seafood, lemongrass, shallots, lime juice, and chili.

products.name: Pad Nam Man Hoy
products.description: Stir-fried mixed vegetables and meat with oyster sauce. Quick, savory, and satisfying.

products.name: Pad Pong Karee
products.description: Stir-fried crab or seafood with yellow curry powder, eggs, onions, and celery. A restaurant favorite.

products.name: Pla Nueng
products.description: Steamed whole fish with ginger, lemongrass, and lime sauce. Light and healthy.

products.name: Pla Thod
products.description: Crispy deep-fried fish seasoned with garlic and herbs. Served with spicy dipping sauce.

products.name: Pad Thai
products.description: Thailand's iconic stir-fried rice noodles with egg, bean sprouts, green onions, and peanuts.

products.name: Pad Ka Prao
products.description: Stir-fried minced meat with holy basil, chili, and garlic. Served with steamed rice and fried egg.

products.name: Pad See Ew
products.description: Wide rice noodles stir-fried with dark soy sauce, egg, Chinese broccoli, and your choice of protein.

products.name: Khao Pad
products.description: Classic Thai fried rice with egg, onion, tomato, and your choice of protein. Simple and delicious.

products.name: Khao Ob Subparod
products.description: Fragrant Thai baked rice served inside a fresh pineapple with shrimp, cashews, and raisins.

products.name: Khao Neow Mamuang
products.description: Sweet sticky rice with ripe Thai mango and creamy coconut milk. A beloved Thai dessert.

products.name: Lod Chong
products.description: Green pandan jelly noodles in sweet coconut milk with crushed ice. A refreshing Thai dessert.

products.name: Khanom Peak Poon
products.description: Traditional Thai layered coconut jelly dessert with pandan and coconut cream layers.

products.name: Set 1 - Classic Thai
products.description: Tom Yum soup + Pad Thai + Steamed rice + Mango sticky rice. Perfect for one person.

products.name: Set 2 - Spicy Lover
products.description: Green curry + Som Tum + Sticky rice + Lod Chong. For those who love bold Thai flavors.

products.name: Set 3 - Seafood Delight
products.description: Steamed fish + Yum Talay + Steamed rice + Khanom Peak Poon. Fresh seafood combination.

products.name: Set 4 - Family Feast
products.description: Massaman curry + Kai Yang + Som Tum + Sticky rice + 2 desserts. Great for sharing.

products.name: Hor Mok
products.description: Thai steamed fish curry mousse with coconut cream and kaffir lime leaves. Served in banana leaf.
